summary: Comprehensive testing of ICEN Sprint 6 features completed. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: image upload in admin editor, interactive WorldMap with country-click navigation to nation profiles, Admin link removed from Navbar and Footer, admin login via direct URL works, mobile responsiveness at 390x844 viewport, and no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: App.js had duplicate code at end (extra closing brace and export default) causing syntax error
Fixed: AdminDashboard.jsx was missing Upload icon import from lucide-react
Fixed: App.js was missing /nation/:slug route for NationProfile component
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 6 blog posts and 5 research papers on startup. Test applications created with TEST_ prefix during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 6 features all working. Image upload via POST /api/admin/upload stores base64 in MongoDB and serves via GET /api/media/{id}. WorldMap is interactive - clicking member nations navigates to /nation/:slug. Admin link removed from Navbar (desktop + mobile) and Footer. Admin accessible only via direct URL /admin/login. Mobile responsiveness verified at 390x844 viewport. No console errors on any page.

backend.GET /api/media/{id}: PASS - Returns image bytes with correct content-type and Cache-Control header
backend.GET /api/admin/stats: PASS - Returns counts including blog_posts and research_papers

frontend.WorldMap on Home: PASS - Member nations rendered with light blue fill + blue border, non-members in ivory
frontend.Nation profile pages: PASS - /nation/india, /nation/brazil, /nation/nigeria all render with flag, capital, region, fellows, chapters, focus pillars, stat tiles
frontend.Navbar Admin link removed (mobile): PASS - Admin not in mobile nav panel
frontend.Footer Admin link removed: PASS - No Admin link in footer
frontend.Admin login via direct URL: PASS - /admin/login accessible and login redirects to dashboard
frontend.Admin editor upload button: PASS - editor-cover-file input found next to Cover Image field
frontend.Mobile responsiveness (390x844): PASS - Hero stacks, WorldMap full width, mobile nav works, table horizontal scroll
frontend.Console errors: PASS - No console errors on any page

fixes_applied.App.js syntax error: Removed duplicate closing brace and export default at end of file
